Resumen

Krabi es una ciudad en Krabi con una población de 60,000. A stunning coastal province with limestone karsts, pristine beaches, and a relaxed lifestyle that attracts expats and retirees seeking tropical paradise on a budget.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
